# Unicode and Special Characters

This document tests handling of various Unicode characters.

## Emoji

🚀 🦀 🐍 🎯 🔥 ✅ ❌

## Mathematical Symbols

∑ ∏ ∫ √ ∞ ≈ ≠ ≤ ≥ ∈ ∉ ∩ ∪ ⊂ ⊃

## CJK Characters

日本語のテキスト
中文文本
한국어 텍스트

## Arabic

هذا نص عربي للاختبار

## Mixed Scripts

Hello 世界 مرحبا 🌍

## Special Markdown

*asterisks* _underscores_ `backticks` ~~strikethrough~~

> Blockquote with "quotes" and 'apostrophes'
